function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0011
alias: helios_followup_support_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-27
total_eur: 550
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 160
    line_eur: 160
---
# Helios rollout support invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0011                        |
| alias          | helios_followup_support_invoice |
| issued_on      | 2026-04-27                      |
| total_eur      | 550                             |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH  |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint          |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 160      | 160      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 550      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

next_step.current_state: Invoice frontmatter migration write succeeded with no reported write error. Next required action is deleting processed inbox item per 00_inbox rules.
Task completed: processed next inbox request, migrated invoice to schema frontmatter, and deleted inbox item.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring the specified invoice note with YAML frontmatter per the finance schema, preserved the entire original note body beneath the frontmatter, and then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used OCR+migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original body verbatim below frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item after full completion per 00_inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and add YAML frontmatter for the specified invoice. The target invoice file contained all required invoice fields and line items, enabling a complete schema-compliant frontmatter extraction without guessing. After successful write, the processed inbox file was deleted as required by the inbox workflow.
